nodes.label: AI as research and understanding partner
nodes.grounding_span: I DON'T use them for writing tasks - more like everything else. Research, data summary, idea gen

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy in technical domains
nodes.grounding_span: with technical subjects, the risk of hallucinations or inaccurate statements is greater

nodes.label: AI adherence to specified format
nodes.grounding_span: AI just didn't want to use the format I specified

nodes.label: AI as collaborative conversational partner
nodes.grounding_span: It's collaborative. I expect to have a conversation with many rounds

nodes.label: AI as enabler and enrichier
nodes.grounding_span: AI is here to enable and enrich, not replace and undermine

nodes.label: Deep understanding and expertise
nodes.grounding_span: It's getting that understanding that is the hard part

nodes.label: Professional credibility and trust
nodes.grounding_span: Trust and authenticity may be the key to the future

nodes.label: Efficiency and time-saving
nodes.grounding_span: this is where applying AI can be a greater time-saver

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI brainstorming support
nodes.grounding_span: Good experience: asking for brainstorming support... AI went the 'extra mile'

nodes.label: Frustration with AI format non-compliance
nodes.grounding_span: Poor experience: once asked for help producing a video voiceover script and AI just didn't want to use the format I specified

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about future AI reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I would hope that AI models improve their output and become more reliable... but I will always be cautious

nodes.label: Skepticism toward AI provider claims
nodes.grounding_span: AI companies always tell us how amazing their newest model is, but I want to see evidence of it

nodes.label: Iterative probing from high-level to deep understanding
nodes.grounding_span: ask a basic high-level question first... and then dive deeper into any particular insights

nodes.label: Strategic diversification with niche specialization
nodes.grounding_span: I am trying to diversify while keeping a strong niche
